channel.title: PlayOnlineCasinos.ca — Blog
channel.description: Ontario live casino and slots news, guides, and analysis.

item.title: 163 New Online Slots Released This Week — Including Pragmatic Play's The Dog House Megaways 1000
item.description: A record 163 new online slot games hit the market this week. Highlights include Pragmatic Play's The Dog House Megaways 1000, Play'n GO's Viking Runecraft 1000, and ICONIC21's AI-powered iDealer Blackjack.

item.title: How Live Dealer Games Work in Ontario
item.description: A complete guide to live dealer casinos in Ontario — how the technology works, the providers, the rules, and where to play.

item.title: Best Live Blackjack Strategies for Ontario Players
item.description: How to play live blackjack with a 0.5% house edge. Basic strategy, side bets to avoid, and bankroll management for Ontario players.

item.title: RTP Guide: What Ontario Slot Players Need to Know
item.description: Return to Player (RTP) is the single most important number in online slots. Here's what Ontario players need to know.

item.title: Evolution vs Pragmatic Play Live: Which Is Better in Ontario?
item.description: A detailed comparison of Evolution and Pragmatic Play Live in Ontario — game variety, streaming quality, and where each shines.
